quoteFirst: The times of the London coach were as follow: London depart 8.0 p.m., Bath
quoteLast: , Bristol arrive 8.43 a.m., depart 6.15 p.m., arrive G.P.O. 6.58 a.m.,--a slight acceleration over 1830.
title: The Bristol Royal Mail: Post, Telegraph, and Telephone
author: Tombs, Robert Charles, 1842-1923
